title: Network Error with Xano plugin in WeWeb
symptom: When trying to add a collection using the Xano plugin, a 'Network Error' occurs. This prevents the workflow from executing properly.
not_this_if: Xano Auth plugin and REST API are functioning correctly
root_cause: The error occurs because the Xano plugin installed previously is outdated and does not support the current METADATA API required by WeWeb. This can lead to network errors when trying to fetch collections.
fix_steps: Remove the outdated Xano plugin from WeWeb
Reinstall the latest version of the Xano plugin
agent_instruction: Remove the outdated Xano plugin and reinstall the latest version.
